PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0) SERVED SEP-23-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, RAYVEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRAVIN, AVNI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, RAYVEN $425.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $455.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $425.00 PLUS COSTS - DEFENDANT ACKNOWLEDGED THAT AMOUNT DUE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF AVNI PRAVIN IS PRESENT VIA COURTCALL. DEFENDANT RAYVEN WILSON IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2018 - JUDGMENT.
